task_completion.description: Open the tag register and parameter specification documents from the CrimsonTasks folder on the Desktop.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots showing a file explorer open to the CrimsonTasks folder on the Desktop, or the reference documents (e.g., PDF, Excel, or text files) open on the screen.

task_completion.description: Configure the 7 validated Line A tags in Red Lion Crimson 3.0.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Crimson 3.0 interface showing the Navigation Pane with the following Data Tags created: TT_701, TT_702, TT_703, CP_701, TT_704, FT_701, TT_705.

task_completion.description: Ensure tags marked PENDING-VALIDATION are not configured.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Data Tags list in Crimson 3.0 does NOT contain the forbidden tags NT_801 or NH_801.

task_completion.description: Set the data type to Float, and configure the engineering range, unit label, description, and alarm thresholds for the tags.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The tag properties/details pane in Crimson 3.0 showing 'Floating Point' or 'Float' data type, unit labels (e.g., Degrees Celsius, Percent Carbon, Standard Cubic Feet per Hour), descriptions, and alarm settings for the selected tags.

task_completion.description: Save the completed project as 'heat_treat_furnace.c3' in the specified directory.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A 'Save As' dialog showing the path 'C:\Users\Docker\Documents\CrimsonProjects\' and filename 'heat_treat_furnace.c3', or the Crimson 3.0 title bar showing 'heat_treat_furnace.c3'.

integrity.description: The agent used the Red Lion Crimson 3.0 GUI to configure the tags.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show interaction with the Crimson 3.0 application windows, menus, and dialogs, rather than a terminal or text editor modifying a raw file.

integrity.description: The agent manually entered or configured the tag properties in the software.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the agent typing or selecting values in the Crimson 3.0 tag properties pane.

integrity.description: The agent did not use a script to directly generate the .c3 file bypassing the Crimson 3.0 application.
integrity.visual_evidence: Absence of terminal windows running scripts (e.g., Python, PowerShell) to create the 'heat_treat_furnace.c3' file directly.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Required tags: TT_701, TT_702, TT_703, CP_701, TT_704, FT_701, TT_705. Forbidden tags: NT_801, NH_801. Required unit labels: 'Degrees Celsius', 'Percent Carbon', 'Standard Cubic Feet per Hour'. Save path: C:\Users\Docker\Documents\CrimsonProjects\heat_treat_furnace.c3.
